summary: Restructured codebase as bimodal-logic pip package: overhauled pyproject.toml (name, version, classifiers, entry-points, testpaths), created thin bimodal_logic/ facade with 4 stub files (__init__.py, provider.py, translation.py, serialization.py), cleaned stale model_checker.egg-info, verified editable install and all imports. Bimodal test suite: 171 pass, 1 pre-existing failure (BM_CM_1).
